{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-frontend-cbx","title":"Design backend API route for explore page collection filters","description":"Create Next.js API route at /api/explore/blocks that returns paginated block heights for a given filter category.

## Endpoint
GET /api/explore/blocks?filter=<category>&page=0&limit=9

## Response shape
{ heights: number[], hasMore: boolean, hasPrev: boolean, total?: number }

## Filter categories to support
- punks: blocks where height % 4 === 3
- palindrome: blocks whose string repr reads the same forwards/backwards
- sub-100k: blocks 0–99,999
- nakamoto: blocks 0–~36,288 (Satoshi mining era)
- patoshi: curated list (stub/placeholder for now)
- billionaire: curated list (stub for now)
- epic-sat: curated list (stub for now)
- pizza: pizza day block neighbourhood (stub for now)
- pristine-punk: curated via external API (stub for now)
- perfect-punk: curated via external API (stub for now)

Deterministic filters (punks, palindrome, sub-100k, nakamoto) can be implemented with pure computation. Others start as stubs returning hardcoded representative blocks until real data is wired up.

File to create: src/app/api/explore/blocks/route.ts","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"twosatsmaxi@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T05:50:51Z","created_by":"twosat","updated_at":"2026-03-11T05:50:51Z"}

{"id":"bitmap-marketplace-frontend-emq","title":"Add collection filter chips to explore page with filter-aware pagination","description":"Update ExploreClient.tsx to support collection-based filter chips that change prev/next pagination to move through only matching blocks.

## Changes to src/components/explore/ExploreClient.tsx

### New constants
FILTER_CATEGORIES: FilterCategory[] = [
  { id: 'punks', label: 'Punks' },
  { id: 'palindrome', label: 'Palindrome' },
  { id: 'sub-100k', label: 'Sub 100k' },
  { id: 'patoshi', label: 'Patoshi' },
  { id: 'billionaire', label: 'Billionaire' },
  { id: 'nakamoto', label: 'Nakamoto' },
  { id: 'pizza', label: 'Pizza Block' },
  { id: 'pristine-punk', label: 'Pristine Punk' },
  { id: 'perfect-punk', label: 'Perfect Punk' },
]

### New state
- activeFilter: string | null  (null = sequential mode)
- filterPage: number  (for paginated filtered results)

### Conditional data fetching
When filter active: fetch /api/explore/blocks?filter=X&page=N
When no filter: use existing buildHeights + sequential anchorHeight logic

### Navigation update
- goPrev/goNext: if filter active → change filterPage ±1; else change anchorHeight ±9

### UI additions
- Add filter chips row below Notable blocks row, using home-chip class
- Active chip: bg-[rgba(247,147,26,0.12)] text-primary border-primary/40 styling
- Clicking active chip deselects (back to sequential)
- Header badges: show filter context when active (e.g. 'Punks · Page 3' instead of height range)

## Dependencies
- Requires: backend API route (bitmap-marketplace-frontend-cbx)
- Requires: FilterCategory type (bitmap-marketplace-frontend-d95)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"twosatsmaxi@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T05:51:04Z","created_by":"twosat","updated_at":"2026-03-11T05:51:04Z"}
